name: Merck & Co., Inc.
summary: Merck & Co., Inc. is a global health care company delivering innovative health solutions through prescription medicines, biologic therapies, vaccines, and animal health products. Key products include Keytruda (pembrolizumab) for oncology, Gardasil 9 for HPV prevention, Winrevair for pulmonary arterial hypertension, Januvia for type 2 diabetes, and a broad animal health portfolio covering livestock and companion animals.

products.name: Keytruda/Keytruda Qlex
products.description: Anti-PD-1 therapy (pembrolizumab) approved for numerous oncology indications; Keytruda Qlex is a subcutaneous fixed combination with berahyaluronidase alfa.

products.name: Gardasil/Gardasil 9
products.description: HPV vaccines to help prevent certain cancers and diseases caused by human papillomavirus types.

products.name: Winrevair
products.description: Activin signaling inhibitor (sotatercept-csrk) indicated for treatment of adults with pulmonary arterial hypertension.

products.name: Januvia/Janumet
products.description: Sitagliptin-based oral medications for the treatment of type 2 diabetes.

products.name: Bridion
products.description: Sugammadex medication for reversal of neuromuscular blocking agents used during surgery.

products.name: Prevymis
products.description: Letermovir for prophylaxis of cytomegalovirus infection in high-risk transplant recipients.

products.name: Welireg
products.description: Belzutifan for treatment of VHL disease-associated tumors, advanced RCC, and pheochromocytoma or paraganglioma.

products.name: Vaxneuvance
products.description: Pneumococcal 15-valent conjugate vaccine to help prevent invasive pneumococcal disease.

products.name: Capvaxive
products.description: Pneumococcal 21-valent conjugate vaccine for prevention of invasive pneumococcal disease and pneumonia in adults.

products.name: ProQuad/M-M-R II/Varivax
products.description: Pediatric vaccines for measles, mumps, rubella, and varicella prevention.

products.name: Lagevrio
products.description: Molnupiravir, an oral antiviral COVID-19 medicine available in the U.S. under Emergency Use Authorization.

products.name: Isentress/Isentress HD
products.description: Raltegravir, an HIV integrase inhibitor used in combination antiretroviral therapy for HIV-1 infection.

products.name: Delstrigo
products.description: Complete antiretroviral regimen (doravirine/lamivudine/tenofovir disoproxil fumarate) for HIV-1 infection.

products.name: Ohtuvayre
products.description: Ensifentrine, inhaled PDE3/4 inhibitor for maintenance treatment of COPD in adults.

products.name: Adempas
products.description: Riociguat for treatment of chronic thromboembolic pulmonary hypertension or PAH.

products.name: Enflonsia
products.description: Clesrovimab-cfor, a long-acting monoclonal antibody for prevention of RSV lower respiratory tract disease in neonates and infants.

products.name: Belsomra
products.description: Suvorexant, an orexin receptor antagonist indicated for treatment of insomnia.

products.name: Animal Health Products
products.description: Wide range of veterinary pharmaceuticals, vaccines, and digitally connected identification, traceability and monitoring products for livestock and companion animals.

partnerships.description: Alliance revenue from Lynparza (olaparib), a PARP inhibitor for ovarian, breast, pancreatic, and prostate cancers.
Alliance revenue from Lenvima (lenvatinib), an oral receptor TKI for thyroid cancer, RCC, HCC, and endometrial carcinoma.
Alliance revenue from Reblozyl (luspatercept-aamt) for treatment of certain types of anemia.
